biological_replicate: Thirty-three male (258.3 ± 2.9 g) and 60 female (173.5 ± 2.1 g) Lewis rats...
technical_replicate: Three technical replicates were used for each urine sample...
experimental_design: sham vs castrated vs T treatment
Twenty-one male rats were randomly selected and assigned to three groups (n = 7 for each group)...
factor_value: sham operation, bilateral orchidectomy (castrated group), and castration + T treatments
number_of_fractions: Two microliters of the mixed samples and 4 μL of protein markers were fractionated on 15% SDS-PAGE gels...
number_of_technical_replicates: Three technical replicates were used for each urine sample...
